RSMPE_FUNT.INFO_TEXT: ADK write: preview then archive to .ARC
ADK read / restore from archive file
ADK delete from DB after archive (Z_ARCH_EKK_DELETE)
Submit ADK delete report with table and test mode
Job ZARCH* + job protocol + ZSP26_ARCH_LOG (no SM37/SARA)
Open archive sessions and view session payload data
Open SALV preview then ADK write (after variant / start / spool)
